Awards

  • Best Student Short Paper Award, ECIR 2025 (47th European Conference on Information Retrieval).
  • Best Paper Award (runner-up), SIGIR 2024 (47th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval).
  • Ph.D. Scholarship, Computer Science, University of Pisa (ranked 1st), 2019.
